title: (chase the skies addon) PINK SKY
description: Chase the skies ,but pink! so awesome right?
body:
REQUIRES CHASE THE SKIES, LOAD ON TOP OF IT
REQUIRES OPTIBOXES

makes the sky look beautiful and pink for a cozy and chill expierience
recommended packs:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rotated-uhd-sunmoon
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/story-mode-clouds

thanks to pato for helping me
(they did so much work, trust)
